scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock'].forEach((f)=>{if(fs.existsSync(f)) fs.rmSync(f)}); const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')){console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1);}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --filter @workspace/adulis-food --filter @workspace/api-server --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
